name: UBA : Potential Access to Squatting Domain
notes: Detects events that indicate the user potentially accessed a squatting domain. Requires the IBM QRadar DNS Analyzer app.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : DNS Common Filter
when any of Event Name match User Accessed Squatting Domain
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Potential Access to Squatting Domain on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : DNS Common Filter
AND when any of Event Name match User Accessed Squatting Domain
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Potential Access to Squatting Domain
